campaign_id.description: Campaign record id this snapshot belongs to.

campaign_name.description: Denormalized campaign name at time of publish.

change_summary.description: Human readable note on what changed from the previous version.

content_hash.description: SHA256 of contract_json. Used as the ETag on /functions/contract.

contract_json.description: Full serialized intake contract as published.

is_current.description: True for the latest published version of a campaign.

published_by.description: Email of the user who published this version.

version.description: Contract version number captured at publish time.
